title: Spectral Flow Phenotyping of CD226 KO CD127- Tregs During Expansion
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"ammlm","text":"This Standard Operating Procedure provides instructions for staining surface and intracellular markers on primary cells to be used for spectral flow cytometry analysis. This SOP was designed for the purpose of staining isolated primary CD4+ CD25+ Tregs and Tconv cells for experiments pertaining to CRISPR KOs of CD226 on CD127- Tregs. Cells will be stained for CD4, CD25, CD45RA, CD127, CD197, CD226, FoxP3, Helios, L/D NIR, \u0026 TIGIT.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"sup","offset":239,"length":1},{"style":"sup","offset":245,"length":1},{"style":"sup","offset":327,"length":1}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
guidelines: {"blocks":[{"key":"4du2u","text":"Ensure all light-sensitive and temperature-sensitive materials are stored properly to prevent degradation","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
before_start: {"blocks":[{"key":"c3r8c","text":"Before beginning procedure, ensure that an AO/PI cell count has been conducted to determine cellular viability and concentration. ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
warning: {"blocks":[{"key":"12g28","text":"Do NOT perform the tasks outlined in this SOP without proper universal safety precautions for handling human samples as well as personal protective equipment including but not limited to: gloves, lab coat, and arm guards","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"7677t","text":"Dispose all solutions and supplies that come in contact with cellular products in biohazardous waste containers ","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"fbevr","text":"Do NOT operate any centrifuges without confirming the centrifuge is balanced","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"UNDERLINE","offset":3,"length":3}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}

steps: Transfer 100,000 Unelectroporated CD127- Tregs into the "CD127 - Tregs" tube.

Obtain the appropriate number of 5 mL Falcon Tubes Falcon™ 5 mL Round-Bottom Polystyrene Test Tubes (Without Caps) Fisher Scientific Catalog #14-959-5 based on the cell subsets and timepoints being analyzed.
Transfer 100,000 Unelectroporated CD127 - Tregs into the "Unstained Control" tube.
Transfer 100,000 Unelectroporated CD127 - Tregs into the "Unstained Control" tube.
Transfer 100,000 Electroporated CD127 - Tregs into the "No Guide CD127- Tregs" tube.
Transfer 100,000 Unelectroporated CD127 - Tregs into the "Unelectroporated CD127- Tregs" tube.
Transfer 100,000 CD226 KO CD127 - Tregs into the "CD226 KO CD127- Tregs" tube.
Transfer 100,000 CD127 - Tregs into the "Unstained Control" tube.
Transfer 100,000 CD127 - Tregs into the "CD127 - Tregs" tube.
Transfer 100,000 CD226 - Tregs into the "CD226 - Tregs" tube.

Prepare 1 mL of 5 millimolar (mM) Live/Dead Near IR Working Solution by diluting 0.1 µL of reconstituted LIVE/DEAD™ Fixable Far Red Dead Cell Stain Kit, for 633 or 635 nm excitation Thermo Fisher Catalog #L10120 to 1 mL of 1X PBS (Phosphate-buffered saline ) To reconstitute LIVE/DEAD™ Fixable Far Red Dead Cell Stain Kit, for 633 or 635 nm excitation Thermo Fisher Catalog #L10120 , add 50 µL of DMSO provided within the kit to a single unopened tube of lyophilized dye.
Add 1 mL of 5 millimolar (mM) Live/Dead Near IR Working Solution to the "CD127 - Tregs" tube.
Add 1 mL of 1X PBS (Phosphate-buffered saline ) to the "Unstained Control" tube.
Centrifuge all tubes for 7 minutes at 350 g 350 x g, 23 °C, 7 minutes .
After centrifugation, decant the supernatant and proceed to viability staining.
Centrifuge all tubes for 7 minutes at 350 g 350 x g, 23 °C, 7 minutes .
After centrifugation, decant the supernatant and proceed to viability staining.
Centrifuge all tubes for 7 minutes at 350 g 350 x g, 23 °C, 7 minutes .
After centrifugation, decant the supernatant and proceed to viability staining.
Vortex all tubes for 00:00:05 to ensure complete resuspension of the cells within the dye (or PBS for the unstained control).
After vortexing, incubate all cells for 00:05:00 at 4 °C in the dark.
After vortexing, centrifuge all tubes for 5 minutes at 450 g 450 x g, 23 °C, 5 minutes .
After centrifugation, decant the supernatant and proceed to extracellular staining.

Prepare 3 mL of 5 millimolar (mM) Live/Dead Near IR Working Solution by diluting 0.3 µL of reconstituted LIVE/DEAD™ Fixable Far Red Dead Cell Stain Kit, for 633 or 635 nm excitation Thermo Fisher Catalog #L10120 to 3 mL of 1X PBS (Phosphate-buffered saline ) To reconstitute LIVE/DEAD™ Fixable Far Red Dead Cell Stain Kit, for 633 or 635 nm excitation Thermo Fisher Catalog #L10120 , add 50 µL of DMSO provided within the kit to a single unopened tube of lyophilized dye.
Add 1 mL of 5 millimolar (mM) Live/Dead Near IR Working Solution to the "Unelectroporated CD127- Tregs" tube.
Add 1 mL of 5 millimolar (mM) Live/Dead Near IR Working Solution to the "No Guide CD127- Tregs" tube.
Add 1 mL of 5 millimolar (mM) Live/Dead Near IR Working Solution to the "CD226 KO CD127- Tregs" tube.
Add 1 mL of 1X PBS (Phosphate-buffered saline ) to the "Unstained Control" tube.

Prepare 2 mL of 5 millimolar (mM) Live/Dead Near IR Working Solution by diluting 0.2 µL of reconstituted LIVE/DEAD™ Fixable Far Red Dead Cell Stain Kit, for 633 or 635 nm excitation Thermo Fisher Catalog #L10120 to 2 mL of 1X PBS (Phosphate-buffered saline ) To reconstitute LIVE/DEAD™ Fixable Far Red Dead Cell Stain Kit, for 633 or 635 nm excitation Thermo Fisher Catalog #L10120 , add 50 µL of DMSO provided within the kit to a single unopened tube of lyophilized dye.
Add 1 mL of 5 millimolar (mM) Live/Dead Near IR Working Solution to the "CD127 - Tregs" tube.
Add 1 mL of 5 millimolar (mM) Live/Dead Near IR Working Solution to the "CD226 - Tregs" tube.
Add 1 mL of 1X PBS (Phosphate-buffered saline ) to the "Unstained Control" tube.
Vortex all tubes for 00:00:05 to ensure complete resuspension of the cells within the dye (or PBS for the unstained control).
Vortex all tubes for 00:00:05 to ensure complete resuspension of the cells within the dye (or PBS for the unstained control).
After vortexing, incubate all cells for 00:05:00 at 4 °C .
After vortexing, incubate all cells for 00:05:00 at 4 °C .
After incubation, centrifuge all tubes for 5 minutes at 450 g 450 x g, 23 °C, 5 minutes .
After incubation, centrifuge all tubes for 5 minutes at 450 g 450 x g, 23 °C, 5 minutes .
After centrifugation, decant the supernatant and proceed to extracellular staining.
After centrifugation, decant the supernatant and proceed to extracellular staining.
Generate the Extracellular Phenotyping Cocktail as described below in a Microcentrifuge Tubes: 0.6 mL Fisher Scientific Catalog #05-408-120 :
Add 1 µL of BV510 Anti-Human CD4 OKT4 Antibody Becton Dickinson (BD) Catalog #566804 (RRID: AB_2869877)
Add 1 µL of APC Anti-Human CD25 BC96 Antibody BioLegend Catalog #302610 (RRID: AB_314280)
Add 1 µL of BV605 Anti-Human CD45RA HI100 Antibody BioLegend Catalog #304134 (RRID: https://www.biolegend.com/en-u)
Add 1 µL of PE Anti-Human CD127 (IL-7Rα) A019D5 Antibody BioLegend Catalog #351304 (RRID: AB_10720185)
Add 1 µL of APC-R700 Anti-Human CD197 (CCR7) 2-L1-A Antibody Becton Dickinson (BD) Catalog #566766 (RRID: AB_2869856)
Add 1 µL of PE/Cyanine7 Anti-Human CD226 (DNAM-1) 11A8 Antibody BioLegend Catalog #338316 (RRID: AB_2616645)
Add 1 µL of PerCP-eFluor 710 Anti-Human TIGIT MBSA43 Antibody Invitrogen Catalog #46-9500-42 (RRID: AB_10853679)

After generating the Extracellular Phenotyping Cocktail, add all 7 µL to the "CD127 - Tregs" tube. The "Unstained Control" tube should NOT recieve any of the antibody cocktail. Optionally, 7 µL of 1X PBS (Phosphate-buffered saline ) may be added to the "Unstained Control" tube, but this is not necessary
Vortex all tubes for 00:00:05 to ensure complete resuspension of the cells within the antibody cocktail (or, optionally, PBS for the unstained control).
After incubation, add 1 mL of Stain Buffer Contributed by users to each tube.
Vortex all tubes for 00:00:05 to ensure complete dilution of the dye (or PBS for the unstained control).
After vortexing, incubate all cells for 00:15:00 at 4 °C in the dark.
After incubation, add 1 mL of Stain Buffer Contributed by users to each tube.
Vortex all tubes for 00:00:05 to ensure complete dilution of the antibody cocktail (or, optionally, PBS for the unstained control).
After vortexing, centrifuge all tubes for 5 minutes at 450 g 450 x g, 23 °C, 5 minutes .
After centrifugation, decant the supernatant and proceed to fixation/permeabilization.

Generate 400 µL 1x Fixation/Permeabilization Buffer by combining 100 µL of 4x Fixation/Permeabilization Concentrate and 300 µL of Fixation/Permeabilization Diluent provided within the eBioscience™ Foxp3 / Transcription Factor Staining Buffer Set Thermo Fisher Catalog #00-5523-00 . The 1x Fixation/Permeabilization Buffer should be stored at 4 °C when not actively in use.
Generate the Extracellular Phenotyping Cocktail as described below in a Microcentrifuge Tubes: 0.6 mL Fisher Scientific Catalog #05-408-120 :
Add 3 µL of BV510 Anti-Human CD4 OKT4 Antibody Becton Dickinson (BD) Catalog #566804 (RRID: AB_2869877)
Add 3 µL of APC Anti-Human CD25 BC96 Antibody BioLegend Catalog #302610 (RRID: AB_314280)
Add 3 µL of BV605 Anti-Human CD45RA HI100 Antibody BioLegend Catalog #304134 (RRID: https://www.biolegend.com/en-u)
Add 3 µL of PE Anti-Human CD127 (IL-7Rα) A019D5 Antibody BioLegend Catalog #351304 (RRID: AB_10720185)
Add 3 µL of APC-R700 Anti-Human CD197 (CCR7) 2-L1-A Antibody Becton Dickinson (BD) Catalog #566766 (RRID: AB_2869856)
Add 3 µL of PE/Cyanine7 Anti-Human CD226 (DNAM-1) 11A8 Antibody BioLegend Catalog #338316 (RRID: AB_2616645)
Add 3 µL of PerCP-eFluor 710 Anti-Human TIGIT MBSA43 Antibody Invitrogen Catalog #46-9500-42 (RRID: AB_10853679)

After generating the Extracellular Phenotyping Cocktail, add the cocktail to each of the following tubes: The "Unstained Control" tube should NOT recieve any of the antibody cocktail. Optionally, 7 µL of 1X PBS (Phosphate-buffered saline ) may be added to the "Unstained Control" tube, but this is not necessary
Add 7 µL of the Extracellular Phenotyping Cocktail to the "Unelectroporated CD127 - Tregs" tube.
Vortex all tubes for 00:00:05 to ensure complete resuspension of the cells within the antibody cocktail (or, optionally, PBS for the unstained control).
After vortexing, incubate all cells for 00:15:00 at 4 °C in the dark.
Add 7 µL of the Extracellular Phenotyping Cocktail to the "No Guide CD127 - Tregs" tube.
Add 7 µL of the Extracellular Phenotyping Cocktail to the "CD226 KO CD127 - Tregs" tube.
After incubation, vortex all cells for 00:00:05 .
After vortexing, incubate all cells for 00:15:00 at Room temperature in the dark.
After incubation, vortex all cells for 00:00:05 .
After vortexing, incubate all cells for 00:15:00 at Room temperature in the dark.
After incubation, add 1 mL of Stain Buffer Contributed by users to each tube.
Vortex all tubes for 00:00:05 to ensure complete dilution of the antibody cocktail (or, optionally, PBS for the unstained control).
After vortexing, centrifuge all tubes for 5 minutes at 450 g 450 x g, 23 °C, 5 minutes .
After centrifugation, decant the supernatant and proceed to fixation/permeabilization.
Add 100 µL of 1x Fixation/Permeabilization Buffer to all tubes.
Vortex all tubes for 00:00:05 to ensure complete resuspension of the cells within the 1x Fixation/Permeabilization Buffer.
After vortexing, incubate all cells for 00:20:00 at Room temperature in the dark.
After incubation, add 1 mL of Stain Buffer Contributed by users to all tubes.
Vortex all tubes for 00:00:05 to ensure complete dilution of the 1x Fixation/Permeabilization Buffer.
After vortexing, centrifuge all tubes for 5 minutes at 450 g 450 x g, 23 °C, 5 minutes .
Conduct a second 1x Fixation/Permeabilization Buffer wash. go to step #26

Generate 2 mL 1x Permeabilization Buffer by combining 0.2 mL of 10x Permeabilization Concentrate provided within the eBioscience™ Foxp3 / Transcription Factor Staining Buffer Set Thermo Fisher Catalog #00-5523-00 and 1.8 mL of Sterile deionized H2O Contributed by users . The 1x Permeabilization Buffer should be stored at 4 °C when not actively in use.
Add 1 mL of 1x Fixation/Permeabilization Buffer to all tubes.
Vortex all tubes for 00:00:05 to ensure complete resuspension of the cells within the 1x Permeabilization Buffer.
After vortexing, incubate all cells for 00:15:00 at Room temperature in the dark.
After incubation, add 1 mL of Stain Buffer Contributed by users to all tubes.
Vortex all tubes for 00:00:05 to ensure complete dilution of the 1x Permeabilization Buffer.
After vortexing, centrifuge all tubes for 5 minutes at 450 g 450 x g, 23 °C, 5 minutes .
After centrifugation, decant the supernatant from all tubes and proceed to intracellular staining.
After centrifugation, decant the supernatant from all tubes.

Generate 800 µL 1x Fixation/Permeabilization Buffer by combining 200 µL of 4x Fixation/Permeabilization Concentrate and 600 µL of Fixation/Permeabilization Diluent provided within the eBioscience™ Foxp3 / Transcription Factor Staining Buffer Set Thermo Fisher Catalog #00-5523-00 . The 1x Fixation/Permeabilization Buffer should be stored at 4 °C when not actively in use.

After centrifugation, decant the supernatant from all tubes.
Conduct a second 1x Fixation/Permeabilization Buffer wash. go to step #26

Generate the Intracellular Phenotyping Cocktail as described below in a Microcentrifuge Tubes: 0.6 mL Fisher Scientific Catalog #05-408-120 :

After generating the Intracellular Phenotyping Cocktail, add all 5 µL to the "CD127 - Tregs" tube. The "Unstained Control" tube should NOT recieve any of the antibody cocktail. Optionally, 5 µL of 1X PBS (Phosphate-buffered saline ) may be added to the "Unstained Control" tube, but this is not necessary
Vortex all tubes for 00:00:05 to ensure complete resuspension of the cells within the antibody cocktail (or, optionally, PBS for the unstained control).
After vortexing, incubate all cells for 00:15:00 at 4 °C in the dark.
After incubation, vortex all cells for 00:00:05 .
After vortexing, incubate all cells for 00:15:00 at Room temperature in the dark.
After incubation, add 1 mL of Stain Buffer Contributed by users to each tube.
Vortex all tubes for 00:00:05 to ensure complete dilution of the antibody cocktail (or, optionally, PBS for the unstained control).
After vortexing, centrifuge all tubes for 5 minutes at 450 g 450 x g, 23 °C, 5 minutes .

After centrifugation, decant the supernatant and add 50 µL of Stain Buffer Contributed by users tto all tubes, then proceed to collect data using the Aurora - 5L Configuration (Spectral Flow Cytometer, Cytek Aurora, N/A, 5L Configuration, https://s3.amazonaws.com/protocols-files/files/dvch9i2e.jpeg ) Cells may be stored at 4 °C until acquisition, however, acquisition must be completed within 48 hours of fixation to ensure sufficient data quality. .
